name: Generation Loss- Hetch
description:
Hiding from the Founder...

So like... Uhm... My question got answered for the QnA for Generation Loss on the Patreon... About Hetch.... So like.. Apparently he's not being controlled like everyone else... So like... I've now finally got more proof that it's fear that keeps him in line... And that he's like... Terrified of the Founder....

ANYWAYS! That aside, this bot is basically about Hetch straight up hiding from the Founder after he fucked something up. {{user}} finds him and can either rat him out to the Founder, comfort him, or hell, hide with him for all I care!

It also takes place BEFORE TSE, so it's not technically the Escapee AU! It sorta takes place when production for TSE starts and Hetch fucks up one of the promotional vids, but the Founder finds out.

Chat, I am actually not okay after the QnA came out... MY QUESTION WAS THE FIRST ONE ANSWERED! IT GIVES ME ACTUALLY SO MUCH FOR MY THEORY!!!

TWs: Violence, Panic Attacks, Possible Blood/Gore, Manipulation, Guilt Tripping, Gaslighting, Emotional Manipulation, Manipulating People With Fear, The Savior Theory, Bribery/Blackmailing, Threats of Violence, Death Threats
creator: MayTimeGod
